featured.title: Over 280 automotive Substrate, materials for UE 5.7
featured.description: The Automotive Substrate Materials is now free on Fab. Download this production-ready material foundation for high-fidelity automotive visualization that also serves as a ground-truth reference for game devs and a Substrate material resource for anyone exploring UE 5.7.

featured.title: Epic MegaJam 2025 Winners Announcement | Inside Unreal
featured.description: It's time to announce the winners of the Epic MegaJam! Come join us as we celebrate the conclusion of the jam; and a HUGE thank you to everyone who participated!
